Our Story & Mission

We Built This Business
Because We Lived the Alternative

There's a phone call nobody ever prepares for. The kind that splits your life into "before" and "after." For too many families across Missouri and Oklahoma, that call doesn't just bring grief — it brings financial devastation that lasts for years.

"We watched families we loved scramble to pay funeral costs, lose their homes, and bury their dreams alongside their loved ones — all because no one had the conversation about protection in time."

That reality is what drives everything we do at Daniels' Legacy Planning. We are not a corporation. We are not a 1-800 number. We are a husband and wife — a family — who decided that if we could sit across from one family, have an honest conversation, and help them put a plan in place before tragedy struck, then we had done something worth doing.

We've seen what happens when families are protected — and when they're not. A mother who can stay in her home after losing her husband. Children who can still go to college because their father was smart enough to plan ahead. A family that doesn't have to choose between burying their loved one with dignity and paying next month's rent.

"Legacy isn't about how much money you leave behind. It's about the message you send your children about what love looks like in action."

Life insurance is rarely about you. It's about the people who depend on you. It's the greatest act of love you may never personally witness — but your family will feel it on the worst day of their lives.

At DLP, we shop dozens of top-rated carriers to find the right coverage for your life, your health, and your budget — with no pressure, no jargon, and no runaround. Just honest guidance from a family that genuinely cares about yours.

Missouri and Oklahoma families deserve an advisor who looks like them, lives among them, and fights for them. That's exactly who we are. And that's exactly why we do this.

Anthony Daniels Founder, Daniels' Legacy Planning
Licensed in Missouri & Oklahoma

Why Families Choose DLP

We shop the market so you don't have to. One conversation — dozens of options — the right fit for your family.

How the DLP Process Works

1

Answer 4 Quick Questions

Tell our AI about your needs, health, and budget in under 2 minutes — no social security number, no medical exam upfront.

2

Get AI-Powered Matches

Our system instantly finds your best coverage options across dozens of top-rated carriers based on your unique profile.

3

Speak With a DLP Advisor

A licensed, caring expert — not a call center — walks you through your options on your schedule, at your pace.

What We Offer

Premium Products for Every Stage of Life

We partner with the nation's top-rated carriers to bring solutions that truly fit your family.

📋

Term Life Insurance

Affordable coverage for 10, 20, or 30 years. Perfect for young families and income protection during working years.

🏦

Whole Life Insurance

Permanent coverage that builds cash value over time — a financial asset you can borrow against while you're alive.

📈

Indexed Annuities

Grow your retirement savings with market-linked returns and zero risk of loss. Guaranteed income for life.

💛

Final Expense Plans

Simple, affordable plans ensuring funeral and end-of-life costs never burden the people you love most.

💼

Business Protection

Key person insurance, buy-sell agreements, and executive benefit plans to protect what you've built.

🌱

Legacy & Wealth Transfer

Strategic planning to pass wealth to the next generation efficiently, with minimal taxes and zero delays.

Real Families. Real Results.
